captions.01.png: I've performed much of the maintenance on this luxury short term rental for several years. Here I'm applying a fresh coat of paint to the front door and handrails.
captions.02.jpg: I installed these golden Polka-dot stickers on the walls to add some flair to the space. I used a laser level to ensure they were perfectly straight and evenly spaced.
captions.03.jpg: I matted and framed these prints of local iconic scenes and hung them on the walls with a 1 inch gap between them to give the space a more personalized touch.
captions.04.jpg: After assembling this bunk bed and adding these thick matresses, the owners discovered they needed a taller railing for the top bunk.
captions.05.jpg: I built this custom railing extension out of oak to match the existing railing and installed it to meet the new height requirement.
captions.06.jpg: The rooftop deck needed to repaired, sanded and refinished.
captions.07.jpg: It required a special stain to prevent any possible damage to the TPO roofing material underneath.
captions.09.jpeg: If you'd like to see more of this house you can go to www.honeyhivestays.com.
